summary: Iteration 54 - Tested SVG flag icons and AI chat redesign features. All features working correctly: Country selector shows SVG flags using flag-icons library, AI chat button is smaller (56x56px) with hover tooltip, clear conversation button appears when messages exist and successfully resets chat.
passed_tests: COUNTRY SELECTOR: SVG flags displayed in dropdown (19 flag elements found) - PASS
COUNTRY SELECTOR: Spain flag (fi-es) visible in header - PASS
COUNTRY SELECTOR: UK flag (fi-gb) visible after country change - PASS
AI CHAT BUTTON: Smaller size (56x56px) - PASS
AI CHAT BUTTON: Hover tooltip 'Hispalo AI' appears - PASS
AI CHAT BUTTON: Positioned in bottom-left corner - PASS
AI CHAT: Clear conversation button appears when messages > 1 - PASS
AI CHAT: Clicking clear button resets conversation - PASS
AI CHAT: Toast notification 'Conversation cleared' shown - PASS
AI CHAT: Fresh greeting shown after clearing - PASS
PRODUCER DASHBOARD: Stripe status uses Lucide icons (CreditCard, AlertCircle) - PASS
INFLUENCER DASHBOARD: Stripe status uses Lucide icons (Check, CheckCircle2, AlertCircle) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: CountryFlag.js: Properly uses flag-icons CSS library with fi-{code} classes
LocaleSelector.js: CountryFlag component integrated in both desktop dropdown and mobile dialogs
AIAssistant.js: clearConversation function properly resets all state (messages, sessionId, sessionMemory, recommendedProducts)
AIAssistant.js: Clear button only shows when messages.length > 1 (line 732-741)
AIAssistant.js: Chat panel width reduced to 360px (was 380px) for less intrusive design
ProducerOverview.js: Stripe status uses CheckCircle/AlertCircle icons (lines 136-143)
InfluencerDashboard.js: Stripe status uses Check/CheckCircle2/AlertCircle icons (lines 552-565)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified all SVG flag and AI chat redesign features. Key implementations: 1) flag-icons npm package provides SVG country flags via CSS sprites, 2) CountryFlag.js component wraps flag-icons with size options (sm/md/lg/xl), 3) AI chat clear button uses RotateCcw icon and only appears when messages > 1, 4) Stripe status in producer/influencer dashboards uses Lucide icons instead of emojis.
features_tested: AI chat button size and tooltip
Stripe connection status icons (Lucide instead of emojis)
